markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content scaling plan and align on operational details.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Scaling Approved:** The plan to increase content production to 15 articles/week is approved for Jan–Feb 2025. This accelerates growth while the market opportunity is high; performance will be re-evaluated at the end of February.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [**Bi-Weekly Syncs from Feb:** Syncs will shift from weekly to bi-weekly starting in February 2025. This provides a more meaningful performance review cadence, avoiding overreaction to minor week-over-week fluctuations.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**SEO Strategy Shift:** The strategy will move from targeting individual keywords to building authority around specific, granular content clusters (e.g., "safe vibe coding for enterprises"). Johanna will define these clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Critical Blockers Identified:** GA4 access was lost, breaking Looker dashboards and blocking performance analysis. A meta tag bug is also affecting SEO for template pages.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### Content Scaling Plan

  - [**Decision:** Approved the proposal to scale content production to 15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To capitalize on a high-opportunity market window.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**Jan–Feb 2025:** 15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**End of Feb 2025:** Re-evaluate performance to decide whether to continue at 15/week or revert to the original 10/week plan.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Budget:** Sam has internal approval and will finalize with finance.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

### Operational Blockers & Solutions

  - [**GA4 Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Problem:** Access was lost during a weekend incident, breaking Looker dashboards and blocking performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Solution:** Megan will provide the required access level and email address; Sam will restore access ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Meta Tag Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Problem:** Template pages have a generic meta title ("Lovable") instead of a descriptive one, which negatively impacts SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a known, site-wide issue Lovable is investigating.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Solution:** Megan will flag the issue with the GrowthX engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current workflow requires a pull request (PR) for every change, creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Context:** Lovable is actively exploring alternatives to the current CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Solutions Under Investigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
          - [A Cloud Code integration with Slack for easier publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
          - [Building a custom CMS within Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Performance & Content Refresh

  - [**Performance (Dec 1–16):**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Impressions and clicks for "guides" increased significantly from Week 49 to Week 50.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [The top-performing page is "best AI app builders in 2025."](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Action:** Update the top-performing page to "best AI app builders in 2026."](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Rationale:** LLMs and Google favor recent content.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will manage the update via a PR.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### SEO Strategy Shift

  - [**New Strategy:** Shift from targeting individual keywords to building authority around specific content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To establish Lovable as a thought leader in key areas (e.g., "safe vibe coding for enterprises").](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Johanna will define the initial list of clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will map existing keywords to the new clusters and conduct new research to fill gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sam:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [Finalize the increased budget with finance.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [Restore GA4 access for Megan.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Provide the required GA4 access details to Sam.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Flag the meta tag bug with the GrowthX engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Send a calendar invite for the next sync (Jan 5 or 6, 7:30 PM CET).](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Johanna:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Define and share the list of new content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Manage publishing of "quiet week" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [Begin the 15 articles/week plan on Jan 5, 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Update the "best AI app builders" page to "2026" via a PR.](https://fathom.video/share/hp2qtrrz-_yxAdwFPCtyuuXtXTQpKyBG?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
